title: Seeing all tasks of users

posts.author: Hauke (Hauke Krenz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I often assign items to users in my organisation, these items are being created in different boards and workspaces. I would like to have one single view, like a board or dashboard, similar to “My Work”, in which I can filter to see the different items I have assigned to either specific users or to all users in order to see the status and other details of the item to see where we stand with each items.

Is there anything out of the box that could be used?

Thank you,
Hauke

posts.author: eanderson (EthanLaunchPoint)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Hauke,

You can change the filter context in “My Work”.

Screenshot 2023-10-05 at 1.35.44 PM1546×551 54 KB

posts.author: fifield21 (Carrie )
posts.cookedHtml: another option is using views to help with your assigned work vs your work.
